title: Unexpected Right Join Result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50), c3 JSON);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES(1, 'test', JSON_OBJECT('key', 'value'));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t2(c4 INT, c5 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t2(c4, c5) VALUES(1, TRUE), (2, FALSE);
SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 RIGHT JOIN t2 ON JSON_VALID(t1.c3) WHERE t2.c5 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: RIGHT JOIN with JSON.ISVALID returns unexpected empty result
